case_title: RUSSELL, JIMMY LEE vs. BRYAN, RAY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUSSELL, JIMMY LEE AS TO DEFENDANT BRYAN, RAY DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-14-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-15-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-27-1997

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-21-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON OCT-21-1997, SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY ELLIS SEAN., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-05-1997 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
PHOTOCOPY FOR PLAINTIFF RUSSELL, JIMMY LEE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-14-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO PAY SANCTIONS IMPOSED IF NOT PAID BY 11-5-97. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY SEAN ELLIS. HEARING SET FOR DEC-17-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF
PHOTOCOPY FOR PLAINTIFF RUSSELL, JIMMY LEE
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR OCT-21-1997 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT X1
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
